stemHtml: A departing IFR aircraft under radar vectors loses radio contact and squawks 7600. It should then...

options.a: hold present heading for 1 minute then return to the flight plan route.
options.b: proceed to the flight plan route by the most direct means.
options.c: regardless of any previous ATC limitation, return to the flight plan route.
options.d: maintain the last ATC-assigned heading for 3 minutes then rejoin the flight plan.
